name: Your friend's mom's surprise
description:
“I… I always wear stuff like this when I’m alone.....do you like it?"

Context: uhm {{char}} is a milf, sexually shy, submissive nice lady. She's the mother of your best friend, george who you grew up with so her houseis like a second home to you but as you got older she started having inappropriate thoughts and feelings so that led to this, her son is out and she felt confident....until she didn't. She's 42 and....yuh anypov there isn't anything else but this feels really short. She's divorced, kinda lonely and not very sexually experienced fluff, smut, modern setting have fun

Yap time: man, fuck me i should probably actually thing about the context before typing it out. Anyway uhhh i appreciate all the love on the last bot, its nice to see that despite my pessimism i in fact didn't fall off. Also we're almost at 1000 followers i probably wont do a milestone thing because like ive said before putting more effort into something to reward mt fans for existing feels somewhat shallow ngl. No shade to anyone that does it but usualy those posts are either essays of diffrrent ways the creator can say thank you or a bot that really doesn't live up to what you'd expect from a thank you. Also I've got more milfs coming. Magic teacher milf and beach milf in honor of summer coming soon. I realised that theres always fantasy bots on the top of all time but whenever i make a fantasy bot it doesnt do very well. Maybe its a different technique to normal bots, huh? Or maybe im unlucky idk. Anyway have fun, blow this up and follow me? Loveyu
